name: Tactical FPV OSD Layout Configuration
description: You are a UAV Fleet Technician for a law enforcement tactical unit. Configure the onboard On-Screen Display (OSD) telemetry overlay for an FPV breaching drone in QGroundControl. The pilots require a minimalist "corners only" OSD layout so the center of the screen remains clear. Refer to the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_osd_sop.txt for the exact grid coordinates and parameter requirements. You must enable the OSD, set the required telemetry elements (Flight Mode, Battery Voltage, Current Draw, RSSI) to their specified positions, and disable the default elements (Altitude, System Messages) as defined in the SOP.
